title: Particle Engine Foundation
summary: Introduces a canvas-based particle engine with five particle types (sparkle, snow, bubble, firefly, dust). Provides API for spawning and destroying animated particle overlays in any DOM container.

changes.description: _defaultParticleConfig(type): returns a default config object with count, speed, color, size, opacity, blur fields.

_spawnParticleCanvas(containerId, configOrType, key): creates an absolutely positioned <canvas> inside a container, starts a requestAnimationFrame render loop, and registers the canvas in _particleCanvases[key].
_destroyParticleCanvas(canvas): cancels the RAF loop and removes the canvas from the DOM.
_destroyParticlesForKey(key): destroys all canvases registered under a given key and removes the key from _particleCanvases.

_initParticles, _makeParticle, _tickParticles: internal engine — initialises and simulates particles per frame. Supports edge-wrapping, sparkle/firefly twinkle, bubble ring style, and dust/snow solid dot rendering.
